original_image_tags: Typed letter on light-colored, aged paper. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top, one with a dark stain next to it. The text is typewritten in a serif font. Page is numbered "- 2 -" at the bottom center.

elements.description: Typed letter addressed to the Director of Special Investigations, containing four paragraphs discussing U.F.O. investigations and 'Flying Saucers', signed '/S/ R. T. STONE' for the 'Inter Continental Aerial Research Foundation'. The page is numbered '- 2 -' at the bottom.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the page contains no photographs, sketches, or diagrams, only typewritten text and page numbering, so there is no visual content to disagree about.
